sourcesContent:
# Declaration forms: type aliases (simple,
# generic, function, block-union, structural), interfaces (plain,
# extends), typed class fields (bodiless — both compilers emit the
# bare field), a module-level @-typed declaration, and typed defs.
# The remaining forms (bare forward declarations, initialized
# class fields, field/method mixes, exports) are pinned in
# test/types.test.js instead — this file must satisfy every corpus
# corpus layer.

type ID = string
type Pair<A, B> = [A, B]
type Handler = (e: Event) => void
type Ok = {value: number}
type Err = {error: string}
type Result =
  | Ok
  | Err
type Shape =
  kind: string
  size: number

interface Point
  x: number
  y: number
interface Named extends Point
  name: string

class Widget
  width: number
  height: string

def area(w: number, h: number): number
  w * h

@tag: string = "root"
sum = area(2, 3)
